ham: Hi, yeh XYZ ka broadband technician hai. Main 3:15 PM par aapke ghar aunga fiber installation complete karne ke liye. Kripya available raho. Dhanyawaad!
spam: URGENT!! Aapka account block hone wala hai. 24 ghante mein KYC verify kare bina account permanently block ho jayega. Kripya 1800-123-456 par call kare ya <URL> visit kare aur 'Y' type karke confirm kare. Dhanyawaad.
